review_title: Love it ! Its simple and just work!
description: Very good, I use it since a full year now and I am very happy, bevor I send my leads to the sales team, they go trough byteplant :D
author: Nico R.
pros: Top up If I need it, no monthly costs just pay per usage, api is easy to use in make scenarios and the answers are right.
cons: its pricey but thats fine for a pay per use service. I have nothing more what I dont like on there service, its all fine :)

review_title: Easy to Use, but Missing Some Details
description: Overall, I had a positive experience with Byteplant. The platform was user-friendly, and it delivered mostly accurate results. While I wish it included more data like carrier info, I would definitely use them again for future phone validation needs.
author: Alberto C.
pros: It was very easy to create the CSV file, and the upload process was quick and smooth. The interface was straightforward, and the instructions provided were clear, which made the setup process very efficient.
cons: It took a bit longer than expected to receive the results, and one downside was that the carrier information wasn’t displayed in the final output. I was hoping for more detailed data, such as the line type or region.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Byteplant offers a quality service for phone validation. It was easy to use, fast results and smooth interface. I was surprised by the cost of the service but have no thing to compare it too. I recommend the service.
author: Kevin H.
pros: Easy to use service that provide me quickly the results I was looking for. It was also an easy interface to work with.
cons: I found the pricing model a little steep. I was surprised at the cost to validate large databases with tis service.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Chari P.
pros: The ease of use. But I would like to test on a bigger scale to see response time of the API - also I would love to have some more detailed statuses.
cons: I would like to have some more details in the statuses. Since I am working in a big organisation a bit more details would do be of a value as to why a phone is invalid etc.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Considering the number of promotion fluffs floating around today this was a very plesant experience.
author: Tony I.
pros: To start the customer support prompt replies are top level. After testing Phone Validator I was pleased to experience all went as promoted. No fluff just truth. the time to get back the report was fast and the report was simple to read. We actually did our own test to check the correctness of the report and it was 100% correct. Glad I found this service and pricing is fair for value received. They past the test with us we will be using them from here forward.
cons: Absolutely -0- complaints the experience and delivered services is as promoted without hype just truth!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Byteplant’s Phone Validator is a powerful tool for businesses looking to ensure the accuracy and quality of their contact numbers. It helps verify whether a phone number is correctly formatted, active, and reachable — across landlines and mobile networks worldwide.
author: Melina S.
pros: The Customer Support. Global Coverage: Supports phone number validation in over 200 countries, making it ideal for international businesses. Real-Time Validation: Instantly checks number format, line type (mobile/landline/VoIP), and detect inactive or fake numbers.
cons: No Deep Lookup: The service doesn’t provide owner info or carrier details in depth, which might be a limitation for some use cases.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Solid with a friendly and quick support via email. Will use the service fruther in the future, but can not complain about anything really. The App just feels a bit off with the UX but that is just my personal opinion.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I really enjoyed the fast setup of the tool. I just created an account, uploaded a list and a few minutes later I had the resulst
cons: The fact that I uploaded a List to it and it cancelled it, which makes sense, but as soon as I added some credits the list started immediately without my approval
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: i like it and i will use it for all my work from now on. overall i love it and i will definitely come back
author: ana P.
pros: that is working . price is decent , but overall i love it . i will use it for all my work from now on
cons: its complicated to get to it .a better price for 1000 numbers ...needs more user friendly platform ...
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Thus far my experience is excellent. The support re any questions has been very prompt. The results returned were very easy to use
author: Robert W.
pros: First of all, very easy to use without the need of any API. Simple uploading of a csv file using my existing columns from my CRM
cons: At the moment I have no complaints about Byteplant Phone Validator, So far it has performed as described
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Phone Validator Tool, accurate results!
description: The tool looks reliable, the data is accurate and the customer support is hands on!
author: Nicoleta Alexandra S.
pros: The support received during my trial and the accuracy of data.
cons: Until now I wasn't able to find any issues or downsides.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Wer schnelle und echte Überprüfung brauch: Ein MUSS für ALLE
description: Wer schnelle und echte Überprüfung brauch: Ein MUSS für ALLE Der Support unterrichtet sofort über getätigte und ausstehende Handlungen. Das Datenmanagement ist sehr umfassend.
author: Ralph S.
pros: Sehr unkompliziert und die Verarbeitung via API sehr schnell. ich habe unsere Telefonnummern überprüfen lassen. Über das Dashboard kann ich schnell erfassen, wie hoch mein Guthaben ist.
cons: Es gibt nichts nachteiliges. Man muß es sagen, sonst wäre ich kein Kunde: Wenn es günstiger wäre, würde ich noch glücklicher sein
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best Phone Validator I could find
description: Their customer support is very responsive and quickly fixed a bug I was having where phone numbers were not accurately being validated.
author: Martin O.
pros: It is the most accurate at validating phone numbers compared to other tools on the market.
cons: I wish the free trial had more credits to start.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I need to validate phone numbers if they belong to mobile or landline, so I need a tool to check if a number is real and active. Phone Validator helps me on this point.
author: Alison Z.
pros: I've been using this tool for years, and I still keep using it because it's very easy and quick to verify if numbers are phone or landline.
cons: No, I love this tool for its easy and quick to use.

description: Almost 6 months using this software for maintaining candidate database
author: Kumutha V.
pros: Mostly i used this software for customer database and verifying the customers data. It's easy to use and customer friendly
cons: I don't have anything to say here overall it's really amazing. Safe and secure way to maintain the database

description: ease of use of the API and flexible pricing
author: rupa K.
pros: ease of use of the API and flexible pricing
cons: limit of phone numbers you can validate on trail runs
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
